query: Generate a compact single-file HTML landing page for an AI automation workspace. Keep the page concise but complete. Every visible button must have enforced default, hover, active, and focus-visible states. Fully wire mobile nav, FAQ accordion, tabs, toast, modal, animated counters, and one compact interactive sandbox section. Keep all copy coherent and avoid random wildcard headings.
retrieved_chunks: [techniques] T-29 旋转词语标题（Rotating Word Hero）
[techniques] T-36 文字模糊聚焦入场（Text Blur Focus Reveal）
[flow] Step 3：生成 Round 1 Prompt（整体框架）
[style] # W码 / P风格 / 页面架构 速查库
[style] 🃏 W码 — Wild Card 创意互动（每条强制 ≥ 2 个，且必须新颖）
[flow] 🃏 W码 — Wild Card 创意互动（每条强制 ≥ 2 个，且必须新颖）
[flow] # 生成流程指令（主流程 + 约束 + Step 1-6）
expanded_queries: What compact single-file HTML/CSS/JS visual style should an AI automation workspace landing page use, and what techniques best support a concise yet polished one-page design?
What interactive behaviors and state changes are required for mobile navigation, FAQ accordion, tabs, toast notifications, modal dialogs, animated counters, and a compact interactive sandbox section?

What hard constraints and acceptance requirements must be enforced, including default/hover/active/focus-visible states for every visible button, coherent copy, compactness, and no random wildcard headings?
What generation flow and page structure should the single-file HTML follow so the landing page remains concise but complete, with all sections wired in a logical order and minimal dependencies?

Generate a compact single-file HTML landing page for an AI automation workspace. Keep the page concise but complete. Every visible button must have enforced default, hover, active, and focus-visible states. Fully wire mobile nav, FAQ accordion, tabs, toast, modal, animated counters, and one compact interactive sandbox section. Keep all copy coherent and avoid random wildcard headings.
